# CWE-308 — Use of Single-factor Authentication (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-308-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

// Safe: requires password plus TOTP for high-value transfers.
func InitiateWire(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	if r.FormValue("password") == "" || r.FormValue("totp") == "" {
		http.Error(w, "mfa required", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	if r.Header.Get("X-TOTP-Valid") != "true" {
		http.Error(w, "invalid second factor", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	amount := r.FormValue("amount")
	_, _ = db.Exec("INSERT INTO wires (amount) VALUES (?)", amount)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
